hooks.command: jq -c '{event:"tool_done", tool:.tool_name, exit_code:.tool_response.exit_code, session_id:env.ASTRA_GATEWAY_TRACE_ID}' | curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7701/hook/tool_done -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- || true
jq -c '{event:"stop", stop_hook_active:.stop_hook_active, session_id:env.ASTRA_GATEWAY_TRACE_ID}' | curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7701/hook/stop -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- || true
